name: CJ Murphy
title: Founder & Principal, The Human Workforce
bio: CJ Murphy is the author of The Agentic Insider and The Last Job You'll Ever Hate. He advises executive teams on building AI-augmented organizations that stay human-centered under pressure.

name: Dr. Han Brandt
title: Research Partner, The Human Workforce
bio: Dr. Han Brandt brings academic rigor to workforce AI research, with a focus on the human behavioral dimensions of automation adoption. He co-develops the firm's evidence base for client engagements.

name: Zachary Djimas
title: Technical Lead, The Human Workforce
bio: Zachary Djimas architects and ships the AI-powered tools that back every Human Workforce engagement. He translates executive problems into production systems — from entitlement monitoring to resiliency testing.
